name: GeoRouteNet: A Geometry-Aware Non-Autoregressive Neural Solver for the Euclidean Traveling Salesman Problem
summary: arXiv:2606.22776v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Non-autoregressive neural solvers amortize computation across traveling salesman problem (TSP) instances, but models trained on random Eucl...
description: arXiv:2606.22776v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Non-autoregressive neural solvers amortize computation across traveling salesman problem (TSP) instances, but models trained on random Euclidean instances can degrade when the number or spatial distribution of nodes changes. We study whether explicit geometric features and a richer within-instance training signal improve transfer across...
author: Xiang Li
